## ⚠️ ✨ Feature Requests

Thank you for your interest in improving this project! 🙌

⚠️ We don’t handle feature requests in this issue tracker.

👉 Please share your idea here instead:  
**[Submit your feedback (EN)](https://feedback.userreport.com/a61a740b-4800-4b53-8c9e-d2b010155416/)**  
**[Soumettre une demande (FR)](https://feedback.userreport.com/a439bf38-6a53-4038-b47d-3f935a2a410e/)**

Thanks for your understanding 💙
